use_cases: Binary yes/no selection in forms and settings
Agreement and consent checkboxes for terms of service or newsletter subscriptions
Multi-select option lists where users choose multiple items from a group
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui checkbox component built on Radix UI primitives featuring accessible focus-visible ring states, disabled opacity handling, and a checkmark indicator. Uses Tailwind CSS variables for theming and follows shadcn design system patterns for consistent styling across applications.
